ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

proof:
by
  rw [IsBernoulliOn, HasLaw] at hX
  rw [hX, bernoulliOn_eq_map]
  exact iIndepFun.infinitePi fun i ↦ measurableSet_mem i
